History of Robert Fitz Harding (1095 – 1170)
memoryArtifacts.description: Robert Fitzharding (c. 1095–1170) was an Anglo-Saxon nobleman from Bristol who was granted the feudal barony of Berkeley in Gloucestershire. He rebuilt Berkeley Castle, and founded the Berkeley family …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert FitzHarding於大約1095年出生時，他的父親Harding FitzEadnoth36歲，母親Livida De Meriet27歲。他於1119年與Eve FitzEstmond結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年2月5日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert FitzHarding于大约1095年出生时，他的父亲Harding FitzEadnoth36岁，母亲Livida De Meriet27岁。他于1119年与Eve FitzEstmond结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年2月5日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert FitzHarding was born about 1095, his father, Harding FitzEadnoth, was 36 and his mother, Livida De Meriet, was 27. He married Eve FitzEstmond in 1119. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 5 February 1169, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert FitzHarding est né environ 1095, son père, Harding FitzEadnoth, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Livida De Meriet, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Eve FitzEstmond en 1119. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1169, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert FitzHarding um 1095 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Harding FitzEadnoth 36 und seine Mutter Livida De Meriet 27. Er hat 1119 Eve FitzEstmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Februar 1169 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzHarding è nato il circa 1095, il suo padre, Harding FitzEadnoth, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Livida De Meriet, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Eve FitzEstmond nel 1119. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1169, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert FitzHardingが約1095年に生まれた時，父Harding FitzEadnothは36歳，母Livida De Merietは27歳であった。1119年にEve FitzEstmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年2月5日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert FitzHarding(이)가 대략 1095년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harding FitzEadnoth(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Livida De Meriet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1119년 Eve FitzEstmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 2월 5일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert FitzHarding nasceu aproximadamente 1095, seu pai, Harding FitzEadnoth, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Livida De Meriet, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve FitzEstmond em 1119. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1169, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert FitzHarding родился около 1095 г., его отцу по имени Harding FitzEadnoth было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Livida De Meriet, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve FitzEstmond в 1119 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 февраля 1169 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert FitzHarding nació aproximadamente 1095, su papá, Harding FitzEadnoth, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Livida De Meriet, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Eve FitzEstmond en 1119. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1169, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
